blocks.label: PROJECT TYPHON: RA
blocks.body: Local assets emplaced near ANK-1. Fuel-grade isotopes acquired, interspersed to minimize EMA attention. Transport to OKU-3R for refinement. Final destination: UUA-2.

blocks.subject: Assignment: Artifact Retrieval
blocks.body: We have detected [REDACTED] in TTC-3 that will assist your research. You are reassigned to oversee collection, transport, and containment. Transport details to follow. —R
